mods.name: Cold Air Intake
mods.description: Replace the stock airbox with a short ram or cold air intake to improve airflow to the F20C VTEC engine and enhance the legendary high-RPM intake howl.
mods.installNotes: Remove stock airbox and intake resonator. Install new intake pipe and filter. Route away from exhaust heat. 20 minute job. Adds 5–8hp at redline.

mods.name: Header Upgrade
mods.description: A 4-2-1 header is the single best bolt-on mod for the S2000 F20C. Unlocks significant top-end power where VTEC engagement makes the biggest difference.
mods.installNotes: Unbolt stock exhaust manifold from below. Apply anti-seize to all studs. Install new header gasket. 2 hour install on jack stands. Expect 10–15hp gain at the top end.

mods.name: Aftermarket Exhaust
mods.description: A full catback exhaust complements the header upgrade and gives the F20C a sharper, more aggressive tone that screams at 9,000 RPM.
mods.installNotes: Bolt-on from the catalytic converter back. Single exit design. Hang on factory mounts. No cutting required. Pairs perfectly with a header for full exhaust flow improvement.

mods.name: Adjustable Coilovers
mods.description: The S2000 already has excellent chassis balance — coilovers with adjustable damping and ride height let you fine-tune it to perfection for street or track.
mods.partNumbers: Ohlins DFV Road & Track HAO 04, KW V3 35250003
mods.installNotes: Full strut replacement at all four corners. Set ride height to 15mm below stock for street, 25mm for track. Front camber adjustment available via top mounts. Alignment critical.

mods.name: Hondata FlashPro ECU Tune
mods.description: The FlashPro unlocks real-time ECU tuning, VTEC point adjustment, and rev limit changes. Essential for extracting maximum power from bolt-on mods.
mods.partNumbers: Hondata FlashPro S2000, USB cable included
mods.installNotes: Connect to the ECU via OBD-II port. Flash a base map matching your mod setup. For best results, get a custom dyno tune. Can adjust VTEC engagement point, fuel, and ignition timing.

mods.name: Hardtop Conversion
mods.description: Replace the soft top with a hard top for improved chassis rigidity, reduced wind noise, and a cleaner coupe-like appearance.
mods.partNumbers: Honda OEM Hardtop (discontinued — used market), Spoon Sports Carbon Hardtop
mods.installNotes: Remove soft top mechanism. Hardtop attaches to four factory mounting points with no drilling. Add rear window defroster wiring if equipped. OEM hardtops are rare and hold value.

mods.name: Individual Throttle Bodies (ITBs)
mods.description: Individual throttle bodies give each cylinder its own throttle plate for razor-sharp throttle response and an intoxicating induction sound at high RPM.
mods.partNumbers: Toda Racing Sports Injection Kit, TWM Performance ITB Kit
mods.installNotes: Remove intake manifold and install ITB assembly. Requires standalone ECU or Hondata with ITB-specific calibration. Custom fuel map mandatory. Idle tuning requires patience. 15+ hour project.

mods.name: Forced Induction (Supercharger)
mods.description: A centrifugal supercharger adds 80–120hp to the F20C while maintaining the linear power delivery and high-RPM character the engine is famous for.
mods.partNumbers: Kraftwerks C30-94 Supercharger Kit, ScienceofSpeed Supercharger
mods.installNotes: Full kit includes supercharger, intercooler, fuel system upgrades, and ECU reflash. Upgraded clutch required. Retorque supercharger belt at 500 miles. Maintain stock compression for reliability.
